text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The showdown set to cap off the year is
approaching fast. After winning the Kikuka Sho,
Super Creek declares herself the newest
contender for the crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the pressure of the decisive race bearing
down on her, Tamamo Cross's appetite starts to
fade again. We take this to mean her body is
prepping for the battle ahead...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But if her portions get any smaller, she'll have no
chance of winning against Oguri Cap. As a result
of our search for another means of bulking up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to retire from the Twinkle Series at the
end of the year. No longer worried about
longevity, we put our all into grueling training for
the high-stakes battle ahead.
